sentences.arabic: تُعَدُّ النِّيَّةُ الرُّكْنَ الْأَسَاسِيَّ فِي جَمِيعِ الْأَعْمَالِ الصَّالِحَةِ، فَلَا يُقْبَلُ عَمَلٌ إِلَّا إِذَا كَانَ خَالِصًا لِوَجْهِ اللهِ تَعَالَى.
sentences.translation: Nijjet (namjera) se smatra osnovnim stubom svih dobrih djela, jer se nijedno djelo ne prima osim ako je iskreno učinjeno u ime Uzvišenog Allaha.
sentences.translationEn: Intention is considered the fundamental pillar in all righteous deeds, as no action is accepted unless it is sincerely for the sake of Allah the Almighty.

sentences.arabic: وَقَدْ جَاءَ فِي الْحَدِيثِ الصَّحِيحِ: «إِنَّمَا الْأَعْمَالُ بِالنِّيَّاتِ، وَإِنَّمَا لِكُلِّ امْرِئٍ مَا نَوَى» [رَوَاهُ الْبُخَارِيُّ فِي كِتَابِ بَدْءِ الْوَحْيِ، رَقْمُ ١].
sentences.translation: U vjerodostojnom hadisu se navodi: 'Djela se vrednuju prema namjerama i svakom čovjeku pripada ono što je namjerio' [Bilježi Buhari u Knjizi o početku objave, br. 1].
sentences.translationEn: It was stated in the authentic hadith: 'Actions are but by intentions, and every person shall have only that which he intended' [Narrated by al-Bukhari in the Book of the Beginning of Revelation, No. 1].

sentences.arabic: يُؤَكِّدُ الْعُلَمَاءُ مِثْلُ ابْنِ الْقَيِّمِ أَنَّ الْإِخْلَاصَ هُوَ رُوحُ الْعَمَلِ، وَأَنَّ الْقَلْبَ يَجِبُ أَنْ يَتَوَجَّهَ بِالْكُلِّيَّةِ إِلَى الْخَالِقِ دُونَ طَلَبِ رِيَاءٍ أَوْ سُمْعَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Učenjaci poput Ibn el-Kajjima naglašavaju da je iskrenost (ihlas) duh djela i da se srce mora potpuno okrenuti Stvoritelju bez traženja pretvaranja ili ugleda.
sentences.translationEn: Scholars such as Ibn al-Qayyim emphasize that sincerity (Ikhlas) is the soul of the deed, and that the heart must turn entirely to the Creator without seeking ostentation or reputation.

sentences.arabic: لِذَلِكَ، يَنْبَغِي عَلَى الْمُسْلِمِ أَنْ يُرَاقِبَ قَصْدَهُ قَبْلَ الشُّرُوعِ فِي الْعِبَادَةِ، لِيَضْمَنَ أَنَّ مَسْعَاهُ لَنْ يَضِيعَ هَبَاءً.
sentences.translation: Stoga, musliman treba preispitati svoju namjeru prije nego što započne s ibadetom, kako bi osigurao da njegov trud neće biti uzaludan.
sentences.translationEn: Therefore, a Muslim should monitor his purpose before embarking on worship to ensure that his endeavor will not be in vain.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ تَصْحِيحَ النِّيَّةِ يُحَوِّلُ الْعَادَاتِ الْيَوْمِيَّةَ إِلَى قُرُبَاتٍ يُثَابُ عَلَيْهَا الْمَرْءُ.
sentences.translation: Ispravljanje namjere pretvara svakodnevne navike u djela bliskosti za koja čovjek biva nagrađen.
sentences.translationEn: Correcting the intention transforms daily habits into acts of proximity for which one is rewarded.
